title: Ethical, Inclusive, and Accessible User Research · Mastery Review
summary: A review board compares near-miss decisions for ethical, inclusive, and accessible user research and accepts only observable behavior, human evidence, explicit non-claims, and owned transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for consented inclusive research packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.
Recruit relevant variation in ability, device, language, connectivity, role, and problem experience without claiming representativeness.
Explain purpose, recording, storage, withdrawal, incentives, and power relationships in accessible consent before participation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Research Question
steps.instruction:
Order the Research Question evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Research Question.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Research Question assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Research Question, keep Research Question connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A research plan recruits only friends, records full sessions indefinitely, and excludes participants who need captions, flexible timing, or nonvisual materials. The quiz variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Research Question has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

The quiz variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Frame neutral research questions around behavior, context, barriers, and decisions instead of selling a preferred solution.

Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the quiz Research Question case

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Synthesis Contradiction
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Synthesis Contradiction: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A research plan recruits only friends, records full sessions indefinitely, and excludes participants who need captions, flexible timing, or nonvisual materials. The quiz variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Synthesize patterns with source links, counterevidence, minority needs, uncertainty, and quotations short enough to protect identity.

Evidence target: Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Synthesis Contradiction.
steps.why: Retrieving Synthesis Contradiction through the concrete consented inclusive research packet case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Synthesis Contradiction, keep Synthesis Contradiction connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Synthesize patterns with source links, counterevidence, minority needs, uncertainty, and quotations short enough to protect identity.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
